Design-Language Explorer — multi-workload · metric locks

AI-accelerator architecture — one model, three workloads

What the variables mean

Active filters

Click map cells to condition on architecture choices. On the three performance metrics at right, drag the amber handle to a target and press Lock — only designs that meet or beat it survive, which recomputes the map and the achievable range of every other metric.

Architectural design-language map

0% 100%  |  sharedsame across workloads   specificdiffers by workload

Performance envelope — drag & lock the metrics

Teal band = the range still achievable given the current filters and locks; teal tick = its median. On the top three metrics, drag the amber handle and Lock it to keep only designs at or above it. Lock one and the others' achievable range shrinks accordingly.

Key mapping choices

Library: realistic candidate designs (v2.0.0, run_v200_multi).
